title: An Act Regarding Government Liability Related to Sexual Acts Toward Minors
final_disposition: Ought Not to Pass Pursuant To Joint Rule 310, Jun 5, 2025
last_house_action: 5/13/2025 - Committee on Judiciary suggested and ordered printed. The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on JUDICIARY . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
